siege.title: Lead a Villager Recruits siege — assault a pillager outpost or enemy structure

outpost.title: Clear a Pillager Outpost using your Villager Recruits squad

subtitle.text: The army is most useful when it does what you alone cannot.

description: A Villager Recruits squad following orders can clear structures
that would be difficult or impossible alone.
Pillager outposts are the logical first target.
The siege system lets you set formation, route, and target.
Assign units. Mark the objective. Advance.
The Wither Storm at X:0 Z:0 has been affecting Overworld creatures.
Pillager activity is elevated near its range.
Clearing outposts in the approach zone is practical preparation.
→ Lead a siege on a pillager outpost [check]
→ Clear the outpost with Villager Recruits [check]
